title: International Operation Underway Following Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
subtitle: Countries coordinate to bring passengers home safely as health experts monitor the situation.

summary.en: A cruise ship named the MV Hondius recently faced a deadly hantavirus outbreak that resulted in three deaths. Following the ship's arrival in Tenerife, Spain, 23 countries began a complex operation to evacuate their citizens. While the World Health Organization notes that the risk to the general public remains low, many passengers are being placed in quarantine. Health officials are working to track how the virus spread among those on board. International experts emphasize that this situation is not like the Covid-19 pandemic and is being managed with established medical protocols.
summary.zh: 一艘名為「宏迪斯號」的郵輪近期爆發致命的漢他病毒疫情，造成三人死亡。在該船抵達西班牙特內里費島後，二十三個國家展開了一項複雜的撤僑行動。儘管世界衛生組織指出對一般大眾的風險仍然很低，但許多乘客仍被安排隔離。衛生官員正致力於追蹤病毒在船上的傳播途徑。國際專家強調，此情況與新冠肺炎疫情不同，目前正透過既定的醫療程序進行管理。

paragraphs.en: An international effort is currently underway to bring home passengers from the MV Hondius, a cruise ship that recently experienced a deadly hantavirus outbreak. The ship arrived at the port of Granadilla in Tenerife, Spain, after three people on board died from the virus. According to Deutsche Welle (DW) Top, authorities from 23 different countries are now working together to safely evacuate their citizens while following strict health precautions.
paragraphs.zh: 目前正有一項國際行動展開，旨在將「宏迪斯號」（MV Hondius）郵輪上的乘客接回國，該船近期爆發了致命的漢他病毒疫情。在船上三人因感染該病毒死亡後，這艘郵輪已抵達西班牙特內里費島的格拉納迪亞港。根據德國之聲（Deutsche Welle, DW）報導，來自二十三個不同國家的當局正攜手合作，在嚴格遵守健康預防措施的前提下，安全撤離各自的國民。

paragraphs.en: The hantavirus is a serious illness that is usually spread through contact with rodents. However, The Guardian World notes that scientists have previously documented rare cases of person-to-person transmission. While the exact cause of the infections on the MV Hondius is still being investigated, experts are looking into the possibility that the passengers were exposed to the virus before they even boarded the ship. Tests on survivors confirmed they were infected with the Andes strain, which is known to be the only type of hantavirus that can spread between humans.
paragraphs.zh: 漢他病毒是一種通常透過接觸齧齒類動物傳播的嚴重疾病。然而，《衛報》（The Guardian）指出，科學家過去曾記錄過罕見的人傳人案例。雖然宏迪斯號上感染的確切原因仍在調查中，但專家正深入研究乘客在登船前就已接觸病毒的可能性。針對倖存者的檢測證實，他們感染的是安地斯病毒株，這是目前已知唯一能透過人類傳播的漢他病毒類型。

paragraphs.en: As the ship reached Tenerife, governments began moving quickly to repatriate their citizens. Deutsche Welle (DW) Top reports that a Dutch military plane transported 26 passengers and crew members, including Dutch and German nationals, to the Netherlands. Upon arrival, these individuals were scheduled to enter a quarantine period—a time of isolation to prevent the spread of disease—lasting up to six weeks. This is because the virus can have a long incubation period, which is the time between catching a virus and showing the first signs of illness.
paragraphs.zh: 當郵輪抵達特內里費島時，各國政府迅速採取行動，將國民接回國。德國之聲報導，一架荷蘭軍機將包括荷蘭與德國籍在內的二十六名乘客及船員載往荷蘭。抵達後，這些人員預計將進入長達六週的隔離期，以防止疾病擴散。這是因為該病毒具有較長的潛伏期，也就是從感染病毒到出現首波病徵之間的時間。

paragraphs.en: For the 17 American passengers on board, the process involves coordination with the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). The Guardian World reports that these passengers were interviewed upon their arrival in Spain to assess their level of risk. Those who had close contact with infected individuals are being monitored more closely. The CDC has stated that they are not recommending mandatory quarantine for everyone, but they are providing guidance to doctors to ensure the medical community is prepared. Acting CDC director Jay Bhattacharya emphasized that this event is not like the Covid-19 pandemic and should not cause public panic.
paragraphs.zh: 對於船上的十七名美國乘客，撤離過程涉及與美國疾病管制暨預防中心（CDC）的協調。《衛報》報導，這些乘客在抵達西班牙時接受了訪談，以評估其風險程度。與感染者有密切接觸的人員正受到更嚴密的監控。美國疾管中心表示，目前不建議對所有人實施強制隔離，但正向醫師提供指引，以確保醫療界做好準備。代理中心主任巴塔查亞（Jay Bhattacharya）強調，此事件與新冠肺炎疫情不同，不應引起大眾恐慌。

paragraphs.en: In response to the different approaches taken by countries, the World Health Organization has provided its own guidance. According to The Guardian World, the organization recommends a 42-day period of active follow-up or quarantine for those involved. The head of the World Health Organization has stated that the risk to the general public remains low, as the virus does not spread easily between people. They noted that they provide advice to countries rather than imposing laws.
paragraphs.zh: 針對各國採取的不同應對方式，世界衛生組織（WHO）提供了相關指導方針。根據《衛報》報導，該組織建議相關人員進行四十二天的積極追蹤或隔離。世界衛生組織負責人表示，由於該病毒不易在人與人之間傳播，對一般大眾的風險仍然很低。他們並指出，組織是向各國提供建議，而非強制執行法律。

paragraphs.en: While the situation on the cruise ship has drawn global attention, experts in Argentina suggest that the virus is well-understood in the region. The Guardian World reports that Argentina has recorded 101 cases since July of last year. Some scientists believe that changes in the environment, such as droughts followed by heavy rain, have increased the population of rodents, which in turn influences the number of human cases. Despite the rise in numbers, officials maintain that the country has a long history of managing the virus and that the current situation is not significantly different from previous years.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管這艘郵輪的情況引起全球關注，但阿根廷的專家認為，該地區對此病毒已有充分了解。《衛報》報導，阿根廷自去年七月以來已記錄了一百零一例病例。部分科學家認為，環境變化（例如乾旱後隨之而來的豪雨）增加了齧齒類動物的數量，進而影響了人類病例的數量。儘管病例數上升，官員仍堅稱該國在管理此病毒方面有悠久的歷史，目前的情況與往年相比並無顯著差異。

paragraphs.en: As the evacuation continues, health officials remain focused on the safety of the passengers. One French national reportedly showed symptoms during a flight home, leading to immediate isolation for those on the plane. Medical teams continue to provide care and testing to ensure that any potential spread is contained. For now, the global health community is relying on established protocols to manage the outbreak and ensure that all passengers receive the necessary medical attention as they return to their home countries.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著撤離行動持續進行，衛生官員仍致力於確保乘客的安全。據報導，一名法國籍乘客在返國航班上出現症狀，導致機上人員立即被隔離。醫療團隊持續提供照護與檢測，以確保任何潛在的傳播皆能受到控制。目前，全球衛生界正依賴既定的醫療程序來管理疫情，並確保所有乘客在返回母國時能獲得必要的醫療照護。

keyTerms.noteZh: 容易誤以為是動詞，其實是形容詞，常搭配 be 動詞使用。文中：An international effort is currently underway to bring home passengers from the MV Hondius, a cruise ship that recently experienced a deadly hantavirus outbreak.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To investigate or examine the facts of a problem or situation.
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面意思容易誤解為「往裡面看」，實際為調查之意。文中：While the exact cause of the infections on the MV Hondius is still being investigated, experts are looking into the possibility that the passengers were exposed to the virus before they even boarded the ship.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To attract or pull the attention of someone or something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「畫畫」，這裡指吸引目光。文中：While the situation on the cruise ship has drawn global attention, experts in Argentina suggest that the virus is well-understood in the region.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Argentina in spotlight over hantavirus as authorities retrace footsteps of ship’s passengers

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Hantavirus: Passengers leave Tenerife on evacuation flights

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Americans onboard hantavirus cruise ship to be repatriated to US

quiz.question: Which specific strain of hantavirus was confirmed to have infected the survivors on the MV Hondius, and why is this strain particularly concerning?

options.A: The Sin Nombre strain, because it has a very high mortality rate.
options.B: The Andes strain, because it is the only type known to spread from person to person.
options.C: The Puumala strain, because it is commonly found in Europe and Asia.
options.D: The Seoul strain, because it often causes kidney disease.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 B。文章第二段明確指出：「Tests on survivors confirmed they were infected with the Andes strain, which is known to be the only type of hantavirus that can spread between humans.」（倖存者檢測證實他們感染了安地斯病毒株，這是已知唯一會在人與人之間傳播的漢他病毒類型。）選項 A、C、D 均未在文章中提及為感染船上乘客的病毒株，且其原因也與文章內容不符，因此是錯誤的。

quiz.question: Based on the article, what can be inferred about the World Health Organization's (WHO) role in managing international health crises?

options.A: WHO has the authority to mandate specific quarantine protocols for all member countries.
options.B: WHO primarily focuses on research into new virus strains rather than public health guidance.
options.C: WHO provides recommendations and guidance to countries, respecting their sovereign right to implement their own policies.
options.D: WHO directly manages the evacuation and repatriation efforts during outbreaks.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 C。文章第五段提到：「The head of the World Health Organization has stated that the risk to the general public remains low, as the virus does not spread easily between people. They noted that they provide advice to countries rather than imposing laws.」（世界衛生組織負責人表示，由於病毒不易在人與人之間傳播，對一般大眾的風險仍然很低。他們指出，他們向各國提供建議，而不是強制實施法律。）這表明世衛組織扮演的是提供指導和建議的角色，而非強制執行。選項 A 不對，因為文章明確表示世衛組織不強制實施法律。選項 B 不對，文章主要說明世衛組織提供指導，而非僅專注於研究。選項 D 不對，文章顯示各國政府自行處理撤離和遣返事宜，世衛組織並未直接管理。

quiz.question: In the context of the article, what does 'repatriate' most closely mean?

options.A: To return someone to their own country.
options.B: To provide medical treatment to sick individuals.
options.C: To isolate individuals to prevent disease spread.
options.D: To conduct interviews with passengers about their travel history.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 A。文章第三段提到：「As the ship reached Tenerife, governments began moving quickly to repatriate their citizens.」（當船隻抵達特內里費島時，各國政府開始迅速行動，將其公民遣返回國。）從上下文來看，這指的是將公民送回他們的國家。選項 B 是治療疾病，選項 C 是隔離，選項 D 是採訪，這些都是與「遣返」不同的行為，因此是錯誤的解釋。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of this article?

options.A: To detail the scientific characteristics and global history of the hantavirus.
options.B: To criticize the lack of coordinated international response to the MV Hondius outbreak.
options.C: To highlight the economic impact of cruise ship outbreaks on the tourism industry.
options.D: To describe the international efforts and varying national approaches to manage a hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 D。這篇文章從頭到尾都在描述國際社會如何合作應對MV Hondius郵輪上的漢他病毒疫情，包括各國的撤離行動、檢疫措施、美國CDC和WHO的指導，以及阿根廷的經驗。文章開頭就提到「An international effort is currently underway to bring home passengers...」，並在後續段落中詳細說明了不同國家和組織的應對方式。選項 A 雖然提到了漢他病毒的特性，但這不是文章的主要焦點。選項 B 不對，文章並未批評缺乏協調，反而強調了國際合作。選項 C 完全偏離文章主題，文章沒有提及旅遊業的經濟影響。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
